title: Bare Bones - Connected Glass
description: Makes glass blocks and panes connect seamlessly, providing a smoother visual while preserving the minimalist aesthetic of Bare Bones.
body:
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-connected-glass)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth%20•%20Profile-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/user/PrincParshia)
[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Donate%20A%20%20BO'OH'O'WA'ER-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&color=black)](https://ko-fi.com/princparshia)

---
## 📗 DESCRIPTION

This is a sleek add-on for the Bare Bones texture pack, making glass textures seamlessly connect for a cleaner, more modern look. This pack keeps the minimalistic style of Bare Bones while enhancing the appearance of glass blocks and panes, giving your builds a polished, uninterrupted feel.

---
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PrincParshia/Bare-Bones-Connected-Glass/refs/heads/assets/comparison.png)

## ❗ REQUIREMENTS

> For **Fabric/Quilt/Neo/Forge**: Use **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**.

> For **Forge/Other**: Use **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)**.
